scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: 7 read streams covering every list/paged GET endpoint in Avni's published external-api.yaml (subjects, subject encounters, program enrolments, program encounters, group subjects, locations, entity approval statuses). Excluded: every single-entity-by-ID GET (duplicate of its list stream's per-item record shape), every create/update/patch/delete mutation (Avni is modeled as a read-only source connector in this repo; legacy itself never writes), async bulk-migration/task/user-admin endpoints (destructive or non-syncable), and version-2-only response-shape variants (this bundle follows legacy's exact v1 items/next_page envelope convention).

excluded.reason: single-subject detail lookup by ID/External ID; identical record shape to the subjects list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-program-enrolment detail lookup; identical record shape to the program_enrolments list stream, already covered
single-program-encounter detail lookup; identical record shape to the program_encounters list stream, already covered
single-subject-encounter detail lookup; identical record shape to the encounters list stream, already covered
single-location detail lookup; identical record shape to the locations list stream, already covered
creates a new subject; Avni is modeled as a read-only source connector in this repo (capabilities.write: false), matching legacy exactly
full-replace update of a subject; read-only connector, matching legacy
partial update of a subject; read-only connector, matching legacy
voids (soft-deletes) a subject and its descendant data; a destructive mutation, not a syncable read, and out of scope for a read-only connector
creates a new program enrolment; read-only connector, matching legacy
updates an existing program enrolment; read-only connector, matching legacy
voids a program enrolment and its descendants; destructive mutation, out of scope
creates a new program encounter; read-only connector, matching legacy
updates an existing program encounter; read-only connector, matching legacy
voids a program encounter; destructive mutation, out of scope
creates a new subject encounter; read-only connector, matching legacy
full-replace update of a subject encounter; read-only connector, matching legacy
partial update of a subject encounter; read-only connector, matching legacy
voids a subject encounter; destructive mutation, out of scope
creates a workflow task assigned to an Avni user; an action/workflow write, not a syncable read, and out of scope for a read-only connector
enables an Avni user account; an account-administration mutation requiring elevated admin privileges, not a syncable data read
bulk-migrates subjects and all descendant data between locations/sync-concepts as an async batch job; a destructive bulk mutation, not a syncable read
polls the status of a single bulk-migration job by ID; operational job-status metadata, not a syncable object collection
bulk-voids subjects and all descendants matching a location criteria; a destructive mutation, not a syncable read
